text.title: EU AI Act Compliance Implementation Examples
text.summary: Code examples for chatbot disclosure (limited risk), resume screening (high-risk), deepfake labeling, and three critical antipatterns.

example.note: Disclose AI nature at conversation start; provide human escalation trigger.

section.title: High Risk — Resume Screener (Annex III Employment)

example.note: Article 12 logging, Article 10 bias detection, Article 14 human-review threshold, Article 13 explainability.
Add C2PA machine-readable watermark to AI-generated images.

antipattern.description: Hidden AI use — responding to customer without disclosing AI.
antipattern.reason: Article 50 violation. Users interacting with AI must be informed at the earliest opportunity.

antipattern.description: Silent emotion detection on audio/video without user consent.
antipattern.reason: Emotion recognition in workplace or education settings is prohibited under Article 5 without explicit consent and lawful basis.

antipattern.description: Fully automated rejection of employment applications without human review.
antipattern.reason: Article 14 requires human oversight capability in high-risk systems; automated rejection with no override path violates the requirement.
